cpSection: Film Quality and Manufacturing Processes Course 2.1-2.5

lessons.title: Darkroom Facilities and Equipment
objectives: Compare automatic film processors with manual processing facilities
Specify safelight, viewer light, loading bench, and ancillary equipment requirements
cp105Topics: FQ 2.1.1 Automatic film processor versus manual processing

lessons.title: Film Loading and Storage Protection
objectives: Apply general rules for handling unprocessed film and packaging types
Demonstrate cassette loading techniques for sheet and roll film
Protect radiographic film in storage from heat, radiation, and pressure
cp105Topics: FQ 2.2.1 General rules for handling unprocessed film
FQ 2.2.3 Cassette loading techniques for sheet and roll
FQ 2.3 Protection of radiography film in storage

lessons.title: Manual Film Processing Chemistry and Steps
objectives: Sequence developer, stop bath, fixer, wash, and drying steps with correct times and temperatures
Manage developer and fixer replenishment and prevent water spots

lessons.title: Automatic Film Processing
objectives: Describe automatic processor transport, chemistry, and temperature control
Identify processor maintenance and quality control practices
